chunks.title: Call to the Redeemed from Wilderness
chunks.reason: Introduces the first of four testimonies regarding deliverance from wandering in the wilderness.

chunks.title: Call to the Redeemed from Darkness
chunks.reason: Describes deliverance of prisoners in darkness and iron due to rebellion against God.

chunks.title: Call to the Redeemed from Sickness
chunks.reason: Describes deliverance of those afflicted by their own transgression and near death.

chunks.title: Call to the Redeemed from Storms
chunks.reason: Describes deliverance of sailors facing a storm on the sea.

chunks.title: General Exhortation and Conclusion
chunks.reason: Summarizes God's power over land and people, urging the wise to consider His works.
